critic.verdict: A solid and physically comfortable chart with clean lane-alternation flow, but it suffers from a premature drop in energy during the second drop section.

issues.problem: Drop 2 abruptly loses energy, shifting from engaging eighth-note streams to sparse quarter-note taps, which deflates the climax.
The transition into the outro lacks contrast because it maintains the exact same quarter-note density as the preceding section, making the song's exit feel flat.

design_notes: S0 (Intro) sets a steady retro-synth foundation with sparse 1-beat spacing that guides the player gently onto the highway, featuring long holds matching the sustained sub-bass. S1 (Drop) spikes the intensity into a maximum density passage with alternating outer lane taps following the high-energy mid-band claps and driving low kick-drums. S2 (Drop Part 2) keeps a balanced but highly-dynamic syncopated feel, with periodic breaks to give players breathing room and melodic contour-tracking runs that shift smoothly from left to right. S3 (Outro) provides a grand climax with dramatic lane sweeps, ending on a sustained high-band melody hold and a final, satisfying punchy center-lane note.

design_sections.name: S0
design_sections.intent: Gentle intro pacing with long holds to establish the groove

design_sections.name: S1
design_sections.intent: Peak drop energy with driving alternating lane sequences

design_sections.name: S2
design_sections.intent: Dynamic syncopation and breathers following the melody contour

design_sections.name: S3
design_sections.intent: Grand finale outro with high-density sweeps and a closing statement
